suite.name: NearbyAlert

test.name: TC-ALERT-01 Driver Hub Shows Active Route List

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Verify Driver Hub Shows Active Routes
Navigate To Driver Hub Panel
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
เปิด Driver Hub ลอยตัวโดยกดปุ่มเปิด

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: ยังไม่มีเส้นทาง
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Driver Hub shows empty state (no active routes today)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
ตรวจสอบว่า Driver Hub แสดงรายการเส้นทางที่กำลังใช้งาน

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: คนขับเปิดแอป → Driver Hub ลอยตัวแสดงเส้นทางที่กำลังดำเนินการวันนี้

test.name: TC-ALERT-03 Nearby Alert Button Enabled After Refresh

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: คำขอจองเส้นทาง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Switch to confirmed tab if needed
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: Switch to confirmed tab if needed

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Refresh Distance Button
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${refresh_btn} = xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
กดปุ่ม Refresh ระยะทางในหน้า myRoute หรือ Driver Hub

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Verify Nearby Alert Button Is Enabled After Refresh
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${btn_xpath} = xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Disabled
kw.msg: Element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]' is enabled.
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is disabled.
kw.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]' is enabled.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=ปุ่มแจ้งใกล้ถึงควร enabled หลังจาก Refresh
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
หลังกดปุ่ม Refresh / อัปเดตระยะทางแล้ว ปุ่มแจ้งใกล้ถึงควร enabled

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้าเส้นทางของฉัน → กดปุ่ม Refresh → ปุ่ม "แจ้งใกล้ถึง" ถูก enabled

test.name: TC-ALERT-04 Driver Sends Nearby Alert Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Does Not Contain
kw.arg: กำลังโหลดข้อมูล
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` disappears from the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: คำขอจองเส้นทาง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Switch to confirmed tab if needed
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console

kw.arg: Switch to confirmed tab if needed

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'เส้นทางของฉัน')]'.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Refresh Distance Button
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${refresh_btn} = xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath://button[contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช') or contains(@aria-label, 'refresh') or contains(., 'รีเฟรช') or @id='refresh-distance-btn']'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
กดปุ่ม Refresh ระยะทางในหน้า myRoute หรือ Driver Hub

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Nearby Alert Button For First Passenger
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${btn_xpath} = xpath:(//button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')])[1]
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')])[1]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath:(//button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')])[1]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Nearby alert button clicked for first passenger
kw.arg: Nearby alert button clicked for first passenger
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
กดปุ่ม "แจ้งใกล้ถึง" สำหรับผู้โดยสารแรก

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Verify Toast Notification Success
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: เรียบร้อยแล้ว
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
ตรวจสอบว่า Toast notification แสดงข้อความสำเร็จ

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: คนขับกดปุ่ม "แจ้งใกล้ถึง" → Toast แสดงสำเร็จ

test.name: TC-ALERT-05 Driver Sends Nearby Alert From Driver Hub

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Navigate To Driver Hub Panel
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
เปิด Driver Hub ลอยตัวโดยกดปุ่มเปิด

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Find route card and refresh distance
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: Find route card and refresh distance

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(@id, 'refresh-') or contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(@id, 'refresh-') or contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath:(//button[contains(@id, 'refresh-') or contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช')])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(@id, 'refresh-') or contains(@title, 'รีเฟรช')])[1]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Click nearby alert in Driver Hub
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: Click nearby alert in Driver Hub

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(., 'แจ้งใกล้ถึง')])[1]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Toast Notification Success
kw.doc: ตรวจสอบว่า Toast notification แสดงข้อความสำเร็จ

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: No passengers available for nearby alert in Driver Hub (route may have no confirmed bookings today)
kw.arg: No passengers available for nearby alert in Driver Hub (route may have no confirmed bookings today)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.msg: Execution passed with message: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route
kw.arg: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.
kw.status: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route

branch.status: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route

if.status: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: คนขับกดแจ้งใกล้ถึงจาก Driver Hub ลอยตัว (ใช้งานได้ทุกหน้า)
test.status: Skipped: No passengers with CONFIRMED bookings for today's route

test.name: TC-ALERT-06 Driver Can Collapse And Expand Route In Driver Hub

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Navigate To Driver Hub Panel
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Not Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Log

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Click collapse button on first route
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: Click collapse button on first route

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ย่อ') or contains(@title,'ย่อ') or contains(@id,'collapse-')])[1]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ย่อ') or contains(@title,'ย่อ') or contains(@id,'collapse-')])[1]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ย่อ') or contains(@title,'ย่อ') or contains(@id,'collapse-')])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ย่อ') or contains(@title,'ย่อ') or contains(@id,'collapse-')])[1]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ขยาย') or contains(@title,'ขยาย') or contains(@id,'expand-')])[1]'.
kw.arg: xpath:(//button[contains(@aria-label,'ขยาย') or contains(@title,'ขยาย') or contains(@id,'expand-')])[1]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Route expanded back in Driver Hub
kw.arg: Route expanded back in Driver Hub
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: No collapse/expand button found — may use chevron icon
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Pass Execution
kw.arg: Skipped: No active routes in Driver Hub today
kw.doc: Skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ใน Driver Hub → กดปุ่มย่อ/ขยายในแต่ละเส้นทาง → รายการผู้โดยสารหายและกลับมา

test.name: TC-ALERT-07 Passenger Receives Near Arrival Notification

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Does Not Contain
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL does not contains ``location``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Step
Log
kw.msg: Go to homepage and check notification
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.arg: Go to homepage and check notification

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'id=chat-nav-unread-badge' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'id=chat-nav-unread-badge' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: No in-app badge found. Browser push notification may have been sent
kw.arg: No in-app badge found. Browser push notification may have been sent
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Check browser notification permission is granted for this test
kw.arg: Check browser notification permission is granted for this test
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หลังจากคนขับส่ง Nearby Alert → ผู้โดยสารเปิดแอปและเห็นการแจ้งเตือน หมายเหตุ: ต้องรันหลังจาก TC-ALERT-04 และ Browser notifications ต้องเปิดใช้งาน

suite.doc: UAT Test Cases — ฟีเจอร์แจ้งเตือนใกล้ถึง (Driver Nearby Alert / Near-Arrival Notification) ครอบคลุมทุก flow: คนขับกดแจ้งเตือน, ผู้โดยสารรับการแจ้งเตือน, Driver Hub, ปุ่ม Enable/Disable

errors.msg: No passengers available for nearby alert in Driver Hub (route may have no confirmed bookings today)
No in-app badge found. Browser push notification may have been sent
